subject: REVISED M6: Comprehensive Evaluation Suite
description:
Build comprehensive eval suite for RAG pipeline.

APPROACH:
1. Create test cases for abstain gate (insufficient evidence, untrusted sources)
2. Create test cases for citation verification
3. Create test cases for retrieval
4. Build eval runner in scripts/run_eval.py
5. Target 80%+ coverage for RAG modules

ACCEPTANCE:
- 10+ abstain gate test cases
- 10+ citation verification test cases
- 10+ retrieval test cases
- Eval runner executable
- Coverage > 80%
